title: ICO Icon
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a Windows ICO file, a container format that stores one or more images at multiple sizes and colour depths for use as application or file-type icons on Windows and in web browsers (favicon).

## When to use
Use `media:ico;image` when a node produces or consumes ICO files, such as a favicon generator or a Windows application packaging step. For macOS icons, see [ICNS Icon](https://capdag.com/browse/media:icns;image).

## Notes
ICO files commonly include 16x16, 32x32, 48x48, and 256x256 PNG or BMP frames. Modern browsers accept PNG-encoded ICO files for favicons. Consumers that extract individual frames should parse the ICO container structure.
